name: TORIDOLL Holdings Corporation
summary: TORIDOLL Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, operates and manages restaurants in Japan and internationally. It operates MARUGAME SEIMEN, a specialized Sanuki Udon restaurant; TORIDOLL YAKITORI, a charcoal grilled chicken restaurant; WOK TO WALK that serves Thai street food; Crackin' Kitchen, a Hawaiian-Cajun restaurant; TOKYO TABLE, which serves Japanese and American food; Pokeworks, a poke food restaurant; and Monster Curry, a Japanese curry shop restaurant. The company also operates Makino chain of restaurants serving tempura; Nagata Honjo-ken chain of restaurants that offer noodles; Kona's Coffee shops, which serve coffee from Hawaii drip-brewed and pancakes; Marusho-ya chain of ramen shops that provide noodles; Tonichi chain of restaurants that serve pork cutlets over rice and pork steak; ZUNDO-YA ramen shops; BANPAIYA store that offers drinks; and HAKATA-MARU, which serves cooked pork broth. In addition, it operates NIKU-YAMAKI-SHOTEN that provides grilled meat bowls; Boat Noodle, a chain of fast food restaurants; SHORYU shop of tonkatsu ramen from Hakata; TamJai Yunnan Mixian, which offers rice noodles; and TamJai SamGor Mixian that serves soup of rice noodles. The company was formerly known as Toridoll. Corporation and changed its name to TORIDOLL Holdings Corporation in October 2016. TORIDOLL Holdings Corporation was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
